assessment.note: She names a concrete aspiration—org-level impact beyond project work—showing strong growth direction and positive forward pull; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'impact at org level' could be unpacked next session.

new_queue.label: Manager investment
new_queue.name: What should I change in how I'm supporting your growth?
new_queue.description: Opens the manager's side of the investment conversation before asking for the employee's trade-offs.

new_queue.label: Next weeks focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Open commitment closer that lets her choose the first near-term move.
